race.comment: SHERAQUAY (15) doesn't win out of turn but is usually thereabouts and gets in well at the weights with the 3kg claim. Should run her typical honest race. DAMEHOOD (9) strips fitter third-up from the spell and is another to get some weight relief. In the mix for some minor money. FORT WILLIAM (5) is a four-time winner over this trip and looks one for the exotics players. THEE CREEK (7) will be fitter second up and the longer trip may suit.
